body.title: MCP matrix logging — channel as log target
body.result: Done: comms module routes all messages through channels with JSON-per-line conversation file logging.
body.description: MCP server (igor_mcp.py) has no logging of its own tool loading/registration. Add logging that writes to cc_channel so MCP tool lifecycle events (registered, failed, disappeared) are visible. Makes the utility closet self-diagnosing. — deferred: scope/priority TBD
